description:
The Project-Env CLI represents the raw core of Project-Env which allows the setup of tools based on a project-env.toml configuration file and therefore the integration of Project-Env into an existing environment.


🐛 Bug fixes
- Fix Clojure installation on non-Windows systems (#294) @repolevedavaj
📦 Dependency updates
- Bump release-drafter/release-drafter from 6.0.0 to 6.1.0 (#281) @dependabot[bot]
- Bump org.semver4j:semver4j from 3.1.0 to 5.7.0 (#292) @dependabot[bot]
- Bump repolevedavaj/install-nsis from 1.0.2 to 1.0.3 (#293) @dependabot[bot]
